svg.title: Binary file transfer — result to viewer (animated)
svg.desc: Resource Server POSTs result files; hub stores payloadIds; WebSocket notify to Image Display; GET file bytes; payload TTL expires.

g.text: Step 1: Resource Server publishes an event with Content-Type: multipart/related
and one binary part per file (e.g. segmentation result).
The context data contains the manifest of each file.
Step 2: Hub stores bytes; adds payloadId per files[] entry
Step 3: Hub fans out dicom-send JSON (files[].payloadId)
Cast Hub → Image Display over WebSocket
Step 4: GET requests — Image Display fetches the files it needs
All three files fetched — bytes accumulate in files[].data
Step 5: Payload expires — files removed from hub memory
